questions.question: Define Bayes' theorem and explain its relevance in machine learning. (Assume you have 1 minute to answer)

Consider a binary classification problem where the prior probability of the positive class is 0.2 and the likelihood ratio of the positive class to the negative class is 2. What is the posterior probability of the positive class? (Assume P(+)=0.2, P(-)=0.8, L(+)/L(-)=2)

A bag contains 100 balls, out of which 80 are of one color and 20 are of another color. The probability of selecting a ball of the first color is 0.8. What is the probability of selecting a ball of the second color? (Assume the selection is random)
